// Code generated by template.test. DO NOT EDIT.
// template.test 1.2.3

package widgets

import "context"

var _ SVC = (*LoggingService)(nil) // Verify that *LoggingService implements SVC.

type ErrorLogger interface {
	LogError(msg string, err error, keyvals ...any)
}

type LoggingService struct {
	logger ErrorLogger
	svc    SVC
}

func NewLoggingService(svc SVC, l ErrorLogger) *LoggingService {
	return &LoggingService{
		logger: l,
		svc:    svc,
	}
}

// DogGetByID gets a dog by id.
func (s *LoggingService) DogGetByID(ctx context.Context, id string) (Dog, error) {
	resp, err := s.svc.DogGetByID(ctx, id)
	if err != nil {
		s.logger.LogError("dogGetByID error", err)
	}

	return resp, err
}
